svg.title: Orifold Technical Architecture
svg.desc: Layered architecture: SwiftUI views send intents to one observable view model, local PDF engines behind protocol seams do the work, and a staged export pipeline writes validated artifacts. Documents never leave the device; a release gate guards the build outside the boundary.
svg.text: Views send intents down, one observable model owns state, local engines do the work.

g.text: Declarative SwiftUI surface — views render state and send intents, nothing else.
One observable view model owns documents, page order, undo, comments, forms, decorations.
Swappable engines behind protocols — PDFKit composes, PDFium & qpdf validate and rewrite.
LOCAL-ONLY BOUNDARY — DOCUMENTS NEVER LEAVE THE DEVICE
